completed_tasks.name: Shared backend validation limits and canonical entry serializer
Canonical batch sync response contract and conflict semantics
Frontend unit harness and Dexie explicit sync-state migration
User-visible sync statuses and restore-limit copy
Separate alert actions from error panel

remaining_tasks.name: Redesign EntrySyncStatus for compact status indicators and restrained callouts
Update component tests and run frontend checks/build
Repeat human UAT and then complete Phase 1 if approved

blockers.description: Human UAT found the sync status UI too intrusive and hard to read.
blockers.workaround: Implement the compact status redesign recorded in 01-HUMAN-UAT.md, then re-run UAT.

human_actions_pending.action: Review redesigned Today, History, and HistoryEntry sync status presentation.
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 1 verifier returned human_needed and UAT found current status visuals unacceptable.

decisions.decision: Treat sync status visual feedback as a UAT gap.
decisions.rationale: The current component passes automated checks but does not meet user-facing quality expectations.

decisions.decision: Use compact indicators for table/inline status and restrained callouts for actionable states.
decisions.rationale: History needs fast scanning, while failed/rejected/conflict need recovery guidance without a large red panel.

next_action: Update EntrySyncStatus and its tests for compact status indicators and restrained action callouts.
context_notes: Do not mark Phase 1 complete until this UAT gap is fixed and the user approves the human checks.
